docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ANDERSON-GRAM, BRADEN AS TO DEFENDANT LUCKY CLEANER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY YOUNG KIM--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON-GRAM, BRADEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCKY CLEANER $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $530.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2013 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LUCKY CLEANER
